blended.narrative: Sasquatch Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,610 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
